translation.literal_translation: And the embodied self too; for in both recensions this one is studied as distinct. (20)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.2.20: jiva is not antaryamin, since both textual recensions treat it as distinct from the inner controller.
translation.interpretive_note: Recensional evidence is used as a decisive exclusion marker.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S02 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit antaryamin and akshara-bhuta-yoni terminology in records 1.2.047-1.2.054.
